title: Raid Rebalance
description: A small datapack that balances raids/totems by making raid evokers drop Woodland Explorer Maps instead of totems
body:
Raid rebalance is a simple datapack that works to rebalance Minecraft by making raid evokers drop Woodland Explorer Maps instead of totems.

More technically, it changes the evoker's loot table to do a location check for a woodland mansion at the location of its death. If this check is sucessfull, the evoker drops a totem. Otherwise it drops a Woodland Explorer Map.

This is meant to make raids less brokenly overpowered, as well as adding an additional quest for the player to have reason to participate in.
